name: eidetic-engrams
title: Eidetic Engrams
description: Browse, search, and recall engrams captured by eidetic-daemon from Claude Code and Cursor sessions.
author: eidetic-works

commands.name: recent
commands.title: Recent Engrams
commands.subtitle: Eidetic
commands.description: Show the latest engrams captured across all surfaces.

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Engrams
commands.subtitle: Eidetic
commands.description: Full-text search across the local engram store.

commands.name: recall
commands.title: Recall (Ask Question)
commands.subtitle: Eidetic
commands.description: Ask a natural-language question and get assembled instructions plus citations.

commands.name: stats
commands.title: Daemon Stats
commands.subtitle: Eidetic
commands.description: View engram totals, per-surface breakdown, and update status.

preferences.name: surfaceFilter
preferences.title: Surface Filter
preferences.description: Optional surface name to filter results (empty = all surfaces).

preferences.name: searchDebounceMs
preferences.title: Search Debounce (ms)
preferences.description: Delay before firing /search as you type.

preferences.name: timeoutMs
preferences.title: Request Timeout (ms)
preferences.description: Per-request timeout for daemon HTTP calls.
